prompt_used: Given 20 representative product titles from one K-Means cluster, assign one concise shopper-friendly ecommerce category label. Return JSON with cluster_id, label, description, confidence, include_keywords, and notes. Prefer a single-level category label for now. If the sample mixes themes, choose the dominant theme and lower confidence.

labels.label: Cosmetic Containers
labels.description: Empty bottles, jars, tubes, bags, and organizers used for storing or carrying cosmetics, toiletries, sanitizers, and personal care liquids.
labels.notes: A few sanitizer products appear, but most items are containers or travel/storage accessories rather than the personal care liquid itself.

labels.label: Hair Headbands
labels.description: Headbands, hair wraps, turbans, shower caps, and similar accessories worn to hold, cover, or decorate hair.
labels.notes: The dominant theme is hair headwear/accessories. Shower caps fit as hair covering accessories, though they could become a separate subcategory later.
